hit-animations.name: Show hit or miss animations
hit-animations.hint: Requires Sequencer and JB2A animations! Enable or disable hit or miss animations. Disable if you do not have the JB2A patreon module or Sequencer loaded!

jb2a-patreon.name: Use JB2A Patreon assets
jb2a-patreon.hint: Enable if you do have the JB2A patreon module. Disable if you do not.

hit-sounds.name: Play sounds on hit
hit-sounds.hint: Requires Sequencer! Play sounds when a target is hit by an attack

sound-select.name: Select hit sounds
sound-select.hint: Select the sounds you want to be played when a token lands a hit on another

dv-display-show.name: Show DV Display on token hover
dv-display-show.hint: Shows the DV of all equipped ranged weapons when hovering over another token. Have the token selected you want as source and hover over the token you want to hit

dv-display-combat-only.name: Show DV Display only during combat
dv-display-combat-only.hint: The DV Display is only shown on hover if there is current an active combat encounter

dv-display-position.name: Position of the DV Display at the token
dv-display-position.hint: Sets the position where the DV Display should be shown right next to the hovered token

dv-display-show-weapon-name.name: Show weapon names in the DV Display
dv-display-show-weapon-name.hint: The DV Display uses the weapon names when setting is enabled. It will use the weapon types when disabled

cover-token-hide-on-place.name: Hide cover token on place
cover-token-hide-on-place.hint: Hides the the cover token when created through the macro. GMs will be able to see it, but players will not.

poor-weapon-check.name: Check if poor quality weapons should jam
poor-weapon-check.hint: Checks each attack roll if a poor quality weapon should jam or break. Do mind that quality of weapons is noted in their weapon name such as (Poor)! This is important for this to work!

auto-dead-status.name: Automatically mark mortally wounded actors dead
auto-dead-status.hint: When enabled, character and mook actors automatically receive Foundry's Dead status effect when they reach 0 HP and are mortally wounded.

martial-arts-autoweapon.name: Enable martial arts autoweapons
martial-arts-autoweapon.hint: When enabled, Martial Arts skills on characters and mooks automatically create matching martial arts weapon items, special move items, and a sheet panel.

skip-npc-initiative-dice-so-nice.name: Skip Dice So Nice for NPC initiative
skip-npc-initiative-dice-so-nice.hint: When enabled, Dice So Nice animations are skipped for NPC initiative rolls on this client.

skip-npc-dice-so-nice.name: Skip Dice So Nice for all NPC rolls
skip-npc-dice-so-nice.hint: When enabled, Dice So Nice animations are skipped for all NPC rolls on this client.

dfAmbientLights-enable.name: Create Lights for muzzle flashes
dfAmbientLights-enable.hint: Requires the modules "DF Active Lights" and "Automated Animations". When Automated Animation plays a ranged attack animation it will simulate a muzzle flash by placing an ambient light source. It will clean the light up on its own.

itemPilesHandling.name: Item Pile Integration
itemPilesHandling.hint: Enables special handling for upgraded items while using item piles. Automatically handles the upgrade items, removes or adds them. There is a delay in upgrade removal, be patient.

missed.evade: {attacker} verfehlt {target} um {dv-diff+1} nach Fernkampf-SG ({dv})! Schaden würfeln, wenn das Ziel auszuweichen versucht UND dieser Wurf den Ausweichen-Wurf übertrifft!

hit.evade: {attacker} übertrifft den Fernkampf-SG ({dv}, {dv-diff} drüber) und trifft {target} um {dv-diff-1}! Schaden würfeln, wenn das Ziel nicht auszuweichen versucht ODER der Wurf den Ausweichen-Wurf übertrifft

melee.hit: {attacker} hits {target} ({attack} vs Evasion {evasion}, {evasion-diff} over)! Roll Damage!
melee.missed: {target} evades {attacker}'s melee attack by {evasion-diff+1} ({attack} vs Evasion {evasion})!

dialog.title: Neue Deckungsspielfigur
dialog.description: Erstellt eine Spielfigur für die Deckung mit TP basierend auf dem Material. Aus den Voreinstellungen wählen oder frei zusammenstellen. Höhe und Breite sind in Gitter-Größeneinheiten!

cover.only-gm: Diese Funktion steht nur der SL zur Verfügung!
cover.zero-hp-no-cover: Alles mit 0 TP gilt nicht als Deckung, kann aber zum Verbergen genutzt werden!

poor-weapon-check.jam-weapon: Beim Angriff mit der Waffe "{weapon}" hat diese eine Ladehemmung!
poor-weapon-check.break-weapon: Beim Angriff mit der Waffe "{weapon}" geht diese kaputt und ist nicht mehr verwendbar!
poor-weapon-check.break-beyond-weapon: Beim Angriff mit der Waffe "{weapon}" geht diese komplett kaputt und ist nicht mehr verwendbar! Die Waffe ist nicht mehr reparierbar!
poor-weapon-check.cointoss: Beim Angriff mit der Waffe "{weapon}" ist eine Fehlfunktion passiert. Es muss eine Münze geworfen werden! Schau in dem Regelwerk der Waffe nach was passiert!

template.portal-missing: In order to use the template placement feature, the module "Portal" by "theripper93" is required! Please install and activate it.
